name: Celso Furtado
description: Celso Furtado foi economista brasileiro fundamental para pensar o desenvolvimento do Nordeste. Sua ligação com a Sudene remete ao projeto de planejamento regional que teve forte impacto em Pernambuco e no Recife.
de: Celso Furtado was a Brazilian economist fundamental to thinking about the development of the Northeast. His connection with the Sudene refers to the regional planning project that had a strong impact on Pernambuco and Recife.
